---
title: "Beetle ACE Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

# Plot the tree with node labels

```{r}
library(ape)

figtree.tre <- read.tree("figtree.tre")

plot(figtree.tre, no.margin=TRUE, edge.width=2, lab4ut="axial", label.offset = 3)
tiplabels()
nodelabels()
```

# Compute ACE

```{r}
library(phytools)
library(ape)
library(raster)

## INPUT FILES
file_list <- list.files('./Data/mean/', full.names=TRUE)
data_filename <- extension(basename(file_list), '.csv')

ACE_outpath <- './Results/'
ACE_outfiles <- file.path(ACE_outpath, gsub("Data","ACE",data_filename))

tree_file = "./figtree.tre"
species_tree<-read.tree(tree_file)

## Loop through each file in Data directory
for (i in 1:length(file_list)){
  mydata<-read.csv(file_list[i])
  rownames(mydata) <- mydata$species

  ACE_column_names <- c("OrthoID", "G_corn", "T_brev", "T_conf", "T_cast", "T_frem", 
                    "A_MRCA", "B_Tbrev_anc", "C_Tconf_anc", "D_Tfree-Tcast_anc")

  write.table(t(ACE_column_names), file = ACE_outfiles[i], sep=",", row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
  
## Ancestral Character Estimation (ACE)
   for (x in 2:ncol(mydata)){
    tips <- apply(mydata[,x, drop=FALSE], 1, as.numeric)
    ACE<-unname(fastAnc(species_tree,tips))
    
    write.table(t(c(tips,ACE)), 
                file= ACE_outfiles[i],
                append=TRUE, 
                sep=",",
                row.names = colnames(mydata[x]),
                col.names = FALSE)
  }
}
```

# Compute Pagel (w/ se)

```{r}
library(phytools)
library(ape)

## INPUT FILES
file_list <- list.files("./Data/mean/", full.names = TRUE)
data_filename <- sub("\\.csv$", "", basename(file_list))
sem_file_list <- list.files("./Data/sem/", full.names = TRUE)

PAGEL_outpath <- "./Results/"
if (!dir.exists(PAGEL_outpath)) dir.create(PAGEL_outpath, recursive = TRUE)

PAGEL_outfiles <- file.path(PAGEL_outpath, paste0(data_filename, "_PAGEL.csv"))

tree_file <- "./figtree.tre"
species_tree <- read.tree(tree_file)

## Guard against zero/negative branch lengths
if (!is.null(species_tree$edge.length)) {
  species_tree$edge.length[species_tree$edge.length <= 0] <- 1e-6
}

for (i in seq_along(file_list)) {
  mydata <- read.csv(file_list[i], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(mydata) <- mydata$species

  sem <- read.csv(sem_file_list[i], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(sem) <- sem$species

  ## Keep only shared species
  shared_species <- Reduce(
    intersect,
    list(species_tree$tip.label, rownames(mydata), rownames(sem))
  )

  if (length(shared_species) < 3) {
    warning(sprintf("Skipping %s: fewer than 3 shared species.", file_list[i]))
    next
  }

  tree_sub <- drop.tip(species_tree, setdiff(species_tree$tip.label, shared_species))
  mydata <- mydata[tree_sub$tip.label, , drop = FALSE]
  sem <- sem[tree_sub$tip.label, , drop = FALSE]

  ## Find shared trait columns, excluding the species column
  trait_cols <- intersect(colnames(mydata), colnames(sem))
  trait_cols <- setdiff(trait_cols, "species")

  if (length(trait_cols) == 0) {
    warning(sprintf("Skipping %s: no shared trait columns between mean and sem files.", file_list[i]))
    next
  }

  ## Output header
  write.table(
    t(c("OrthoID", "Lambda", "P")),
    file = PAGEL_outfiles[i],
    sep = ",",
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = FALSE,
    quote = FALSE
  )

  ## Calculate Pagel's lambda for each shared trait
  for (trait_name in trait_cols) {
    tips <- as.numeric(mydata[[trait_name]])
    se <- as.numeric(sem[[trait_name]])

    names(tips) <- rownames(mydata)
    names(se) <- rownames(sem)

    if (any(is.na(tips)) || any(is.na(se)) || length(unique(tips)) < 2 || any(se < 0)) {
      write.table(
        t(c(NA, NA)),
        file = PAGEL_outfiles[i],
        append = TRUE,
        sep = ",",
        row.names = trait_name,
        col.names = FALSE,
        quote = FALSE
      )
      next
    }

    se[se == 0] <- 1e-8

    pagel <- try(
      phylosig(tree_sub, tips, se = se, method = "lambda", test = TRUE),
      silent = TRUE
    )

    if (inherits(pagel, "try-error")) {
      write.table(
        t(c(NA, NA)),
        file = PAGEL_outfiles[i],
        append = TRUE,
        sep = ",",
        row.names = trait_name,
        col.names = FALSE,
        quote = FALSE
      )
    } else {
      write.table(
        t(c(pagel$lambda, pagel$P)),
        file = PAGEL_outfiles[i],
        append = TRUE,
        sep = ",",
        row.names = trait_name,
        col.names = FALSE,
        quote = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
}
```
